entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
PATCHY FOG THIS MORNING
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 90
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
